title: Iran War Is the First AI-Driven Conflict With Machines Making Kill Decisions | 10 News +
description: The war in Iran is emerging as a turning point in modern conflict, becoming one of the first wars heavily reliant on artificial intelligence. title: Mystery Around Iran’s New Leader As Health Questions Grow | 10 News+
description: Questions are growing over the condition of Iran’s new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, who has not appeared publicly since taking power. Despite his absence, Iran says it will keep the Strait of Hormuz closed — a critical global oil route — fuelling speculation about the leader’s health and who is directing the country’s war strategy. title: Trump Says US 'Totally Obliterated’ Military Targets On Iran’s Kharg Island | 10 News
description: President Donald Trump has said US forces have “totally obliterated” military targets on Iran’s Kharg Island and warned oil infrastructure there could be attacked next.  Trump posted on Truth Social stating, "the United States Central Command executed one of the most powerful bombing raids in the history of the Middle East and totally obliterated every military target in Iran’s crown jewel, Kharg Island.”  The announcement came shortly after Trump fronted reporters before boarding Air Force One to fly to Florida on Friday saying, “Just about everything is gone and you'll see that, but today we've had some very, very big hits, very powerful hits."  It’s understood the island accounts for 90 per cent of Iran's oil exports and is an economic lifeline for the regime in Tehran. title: Thousands Of Snow Geese Make Annual Flight To Arctic | 10 News
description: Birdwatchers have flocked to the shores of a Pennsylvania reservoir to witness thousands of migrating snow geese take to the air in a mesmerising sunrise display.  The birds were seen circling a few times before heading out to neighbouring farm fields, seeking unharvested grains in preparation for their annual spring flight to Quebec in Canada’s Arctic region.
